subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested the Manifestation of His Self through a proof that encompasseth all created things and through evidence wherefrom the fragrance of the All-Merciful is diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر مظهر نفسه بحجة احاطت الکائنات و برهان تضوع به عرف الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution
